questions.question: What is the maximum slow tempo-sync speed the LFO supports, and what options exist for rates slower than 1/1 bar (e.g., 2/1, 4/1)?
What exactly does the Phase parameter control, and does it only affect the start position on reset or does it shift the running phase continuously?
When does the LFO reset its phase - is it per note-on, per voice, or continuously running - and how does placement in the module tree affect this?
How do you prevent the LFO from retriggering on each note-on, and what is the IgnoreNoteOn attribute (parameter index 10)?
What does the SyncToMasterClock mode actually do, and how does it differ from using Engine.createTransportHandler() to lock to DAW playback position?
Does Loop Mode work with all LFO waveform types, or only Custom and Pattern waveforms?
What happens to LFO quality and accuracy above ~30-40 Hz, and can reducing HISE_EVENT_RASTER fix the degradation?
Why does LFO-modulated filter frequency produce an audible click or pop on note retrigger, and how can it be avoided?
How do you randomize the LFO start phase per voice without scaling the LFO's output range?
What is the difference between using the built-in LFO, a scriptnode time-variant modulator, and a scriptnode envelope for retrigger and polyphony behaviour?
How does LFO placement in the module tree (root container vs inside sampler) affect phase reset and FadeIn behaviour?
